Announcements

Latest news and updates for Frazer families and staff.

Latest news and updates from the Frazer School PTA and school offices.

Middle School

Middle School May 20, 2025

Book fair volunteers needed

Sign up for a two-hour shift during the week of May 28. Contact the PTA or the main office.

Middle School May 12, 2025

8th grade celebration reminders

Permission slips due May 30. Students should arrive by 6:00 PM on June 5.

High School

High School May 18, 2025

Senior week schedule posted

Full schedule is on the parent portal. Families with questions should call the main office.

High School May 8, 2025

Athletic booster meeting

Tuesday, May 13 at 7:00 PM in the stadium concession area. All sports parents welcome.

District-wide

May 1, 2025

PTA membership drive

$10 per family for the school year. Join at either campus office or any PTA meeting.

© 2025 Frazer School PTA. All rights reserved.

Serving Frazer Middle School and Frazer High School. Maintained by parent volunteers.
